message:
feat(ars): add anytime-valid e-value drift detection for reflex monitoring

Implements ft-tkpgy.4.3: test martingale e-values for mathematically rigorous
drift detection. Calibration phase → adaptive betting → threshold rejection.
Auto-demotes drifted reflexes to shadow mode.
29 inline tests + 17 proptests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
